image_prompt: A cartoonish, exaggerated sun character, wearing oversized sunglasses, flexing its bicep and emitting extremely bright, cheerful rays over a vibrant, happy daytime scene. The scene includes people picnicking, flowers blooming, and birds flying. The sun looks proud and confident of its job. The text 'O sol brilha durante o dia.' is displayed prominently in a cheerful, bold, yellow-orange font as if it's the sun's speech bubble or part of the bright rays. Whimsical, warm, high contrast, high detail, 3D illustration style.
short_sentence: O sol brilha durante o dia.
caption: Notícia de última hora: O sol brilha durante o dia! ☀️ Quem mais ficou surpreso com essa revelação? 😂 Marque aquele amigo que vive no mundo da lua! #SolBrilhante #DiaLindo #FatoInquestionável #EnergiaSolar
